channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Vinicius Junior scores hat trick as Real Madrid beats Dortmund 5-2 in Champions League
item.description: Vinicius Junior scored a hat trick as Real Madrid turned boos into cheers with a 5-2 win over Borussia Dortmund in the Champions League on Tuesday, while Paris Saint-Germain dropped more points.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ELLINGWORTH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pulisic scores direct from corner kick for AC Milan. Then admits it was an accident
item.description: MILAN (AP) — Christian Pulisic scored direct from a corner kick to set AC Milan on the way to its first victory in this season's Champions League. But the United States international admitted it was an accident.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Stanley Cup champion Panthers and coach Paul Maurice agree on contract extension
item.description: SUNRISE, Fla. (AP) — The Florida Panthers have given out another big extension — this one, to their Stanley Cup-winning coach. Paul Maurice and the Panthers have agreed on an extended contract, the team announced Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Prep water polo rankings, Oct. 22, 2024: Bay Area News Group Top 10
item.description: High school water polo: Miramonte takes top spot in boys rankings. Bellarmine, Liberty, Berkeley boys, Las Lomas girls enter rankings.
item.dc:creator: Nathan Canilao, The Mercury News

item.title: MLB wants the Tampa Bay Rays to play in the area if hurricane-damaged Tropicana Field is unfit
item.description: Major League Baseball hopes to find the Tampa Bay Rays a temporary home near their fanbase for the start of the 2025 season if their home field can't be repaired in time.
item.dc:creator: Curt Anderson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Watkins, Bueckers headline preseason AP All-America team in women's hoops; 3 sophomores for 1st time
item.description: USC star JuJu Watkins and UConn’s Paige Bueckers headline The Associated Press preseason All-America team that for the first time includes three sophomores in a clear sign of the young talent in a sport coming off a record year of fan interest.
item.dc:creator: Doug Feinberg, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: BYU staying humble and hungry during winning streak
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - It was a drive that will go down in school history. The 4th-and-8 conversion to Chase Roberts. The Jake Retzlaff 27-yard scramble. And then the 35-yard strike to Darius Lassiter with 10 seconds left to beat Oklahoma State, 38-35.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 49ers star Deebo Samuel Sr. hospitalized with pneumonia, fluid in lungs after trying to play vs. Chiefs
item.description: San Francisco 49ers star receiver Deebo Samuel Sr. is in the hospital with pneumonia and fluid in his lungs, his head coach Kyle Shanahan announced on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tests confirm a season-ending knee injury for 49ers receiver Brandon Aiyuk
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — San Francisco 49ers star receiver Brandon Aiyuk will miss the rest of the season after tearing ligaments in his right knee.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: WNBA players union decides to opt out of current collective bargaining agreement
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The WNBA players union has decided to opt out of the current collective bargaining agreement, two years before its expiration. The league and players union had the option to do so before Nov. 1. The early opt-out marks a crucial juncture for the league.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Raiders QB Aidan O'Connell expected to be out 4-6 weeks with a broken thumb, AP source says
item.description: HENDERSON, Nev. (AP) — Las Vegas Raiders quarterback Aidan O'Connell is expected to be out four to six weeks with a broken thumb, a person close to the situation said Monday. The person spoke to The Associated Press on condition of anonymity because the Raiders have not made an announcement.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: WNBA champion, Bay Area native shattered records in latest series
item.description: (KRON) – The New York Liberty officially won a WNBA Championship after defeating the Minnesota Lynx in a nail-biting Game 5 (67-62). Liberty point guard and Miramonte High School alum Sabrina Ionescu won her first chip with multiple accolades.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: New York Liberty win first WNBA championship, beating Minnesota 67-62 in OT
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — As confetti fell and Frank Sinatra’s “New York, New York” blared through the arena, the New York Liberty celebrated the end of a long odyssey.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: NFL legend compares Jared Goff to Tom Brady after impressive comeback victory vs. Vikings
item.description: NFL legend and five-time Super Bowl champion Terry Bradshaw compared Jared Goff to the goat Tom Brady after the Detroit Lions took down the Minnesota Vikings 31-29.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: Dodgers finish off Mets with 10-5 win in NLCS and advance to face Yankees in World Series
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani carried the injury-riddled Los Angeles Dodgers to baseball's best record during the regular season. Tommy Edman joined the team in late July and helped them reach the World Series. It's been that kind of year for the big-spending Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Dodgers vs. Yankees in the World Series? It's more common than you think
item.description: The Fall Classic is set, and the matchup is a classic all right. The Los Angeles Dodgers clinched the National League pennant on Sunday, closing out the New York Mets in six games in the NL Championship Series. That means that baseball fans are getting a dream matchup in the World Series.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Photo Gallery: NL Champs! Dodgers finish Mets to advance to World Series
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers are heading to the 2024 World Series. With a 10-5 home win over the Mets on Sunday, the Dodgers claimed their 25th National League pennant, beating New York 4 games to 2 in the best of seven series.
item.dc:creator: Lily Dallow, KTLA 5

item.title: Patrick Mahomes and Chiefs stay undefeated, beat 49ers 28-18 in Super Bowl rematch
item.description: The formula might look a bit different with the defense and running game carrying the Kansas City Chiefs. But the results are awfully familiar as the two-time defending champions keep knocking off teams — especially the San Francisco 49ers.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jayden Daniels to get further tests Monday after leaving the Commanders' game with a rib injury
item.description: Jayden Daniels will undergo further tests Monday after leaving the Washington Commanders’ game against the Carolina Panthers with a rib injury, coach Dan Quinn said, repeatedly adding he had no further update on the rookie quarterback's status.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: New Zealand wins cricket's Women’s T20 World Cup for 1st time with 32-run victory over South Africa
item.description: New Zealand won the Women’s T20 World Cup for the first time, beating South Africa by 32 runs on Sunday after a standout performance from Amelia Kerr with bat and ball.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: SDSU'S Sack Master Trey White
item.description: Sacks are such an unpredictable stat in the game of Football. You can be absolutely unlockable as a defender, but if the quarterback gets the ball out of his hands before you arrive, it's all for not in the stat column.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: CMU inducts BJ Russell into the Hall of Honor
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Colorado Mesa University recently honored two former athletes, linebacker BJ Russell and volleyball setter Jordyn Moody, for their outstanding contributions to CMU athletics.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: USU gives up 21 points in fourth quarter, lose to New Mexico
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State's losing streak hit six games, and this one was the most hearbreaking. Devon Dampier and Eli Sanders had touchdown runs in the final 3:53 to rally New Mexico to a 50-45 victory over Utah State on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Christian Barmore apologizes to Rhode Island police after racism remarks
item.description: Patriots defensive tackle Christian Barmore issued an apology on social media to the Providence Police Department after he accused officers of racism during a recent traffic stop.
item.dc:creator: Raymond Baccari, NewsNation

item.title: Real Salt Lake legend reflects on his journey, leadership, and life beyond the pitch
item.description: Real Salt Lake legend and current Vancouver Whitecaps FC standout Damir Kreilach joins Royal Riot co-host Mattey Casey for an exclusive interview, just ahead of his much-anticipated return to America First Field.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Kyle Larson opens the third round of NASCAR's playoffs as the title favorite
item.description: Kyle Larson has been lucky of late in Las Vegas, where he opens the third round of NASCAR's playoffs on top of the Cup Series standings and the favorite to win Sunday's race.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Virginia McCaskey named Top 25 candidate in "Contributor" category for Pro Football HoF's Class of 2025
item.description: CANTON, Ohio (WGN) — Virginia McCaskey has been named one of 25 candidates for the "Contributor" category in the Pro Football Hall of Fame's Class of 2025.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
